channel.title: France 24 - International breaking news, top stories and headlines
channel.description: Breaking news and world news from France 24 on Business, Sports, Culture. Video news. News from the US, Europe, Asia Pacific, Africa, Middle East, America

item.title: World Cup 2026: Sweden make statement with commanding victory over Tunisia
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: World Cup 2026: Sweden make statement with commanding victory over Tunisia
item.description: Sweden claimed a commanding 5-1 victory over Tunisia in Monterrey, Mexico, taking a significant step toward Group F progression. Gyökeres, Isak, Ayari and Svanberg found the net for Graham Potter's side, with Omar Rekik's consolation goal proving insufficient to salvage a point for the North African underdogs.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: In Pictures: Trump marks 80th birthday with White House UFC spectacle
item.description: US President Donald Trump marked his 80th birthday with a highly unusual White House spectacle, hosting a UFC cage fight on the South Lawn just hours after announcing a memorandum of understanding with Iran, in a made-for-television display blending politics, sport and patriotic pageantry.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: G7 summit opens in France with Ukraine war, new US-Iran agreement on agenda
item.description: The memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran was announced on the eve of the G7 summit in Evian-les-Bains, France, where leaders from some of the world’s wealthiest nations will begin meeting Monday. Gathered in the Alps through Wednesday, they will also discuss the war in Ukraine and global economic imbalances.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Middle East live: Macron says G7 leaders to discuss 'long-term reopening' of Hormuz strait
item.description: Ahead of the signing of a US-Iranian memorandum of understanding scheduled for Friday in Geneva, G7 leaders will meet in Evian on Monday to discuss “the implications of this agreement, support for Lebanon, the long-term reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, and, of course, the conclusion of an agreement on Iran’s nuclear and ballistic missile programs,” according to French President Emmanuel Macron. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Kyiv monastery damaged in Russian air attack as strikes intensify across Ukraine
item.description: Twenty people were injured and Kyiv’s historic Pechersk Lavra monastery was set on fire after a major Russian air attack on the Ukrainian capital, authorities said on Monday. Drone and missile strikes left widespread damage, caused power outages for hundreds of thousands of residents, and prompted renewed air defences across the region.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: World Cup: Ivory Coast beats Ecuador with late strike from Amad Diallo
item.description: Substitute Amad Diallo struck in the 90th minute to give Ivory Coast a 1-0 victory over Ecuador in their Group E World Cup opener on Saturday, sealing a dramatic finish after a tight contest in which both sides created chances but failed to convert until the final moments.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: US and Iran reach agreement to reopen Hormuz strait, put 'immediate' end to military operations
item.description: US and Iran agreed to an “immediate and permanent” end to military operations under a surprise memorandum of understanding announced via mediator Pakistan on Sunday, with both sides confirming a signing ceremony in Switzerland. The agreement includes plans to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, ease sanctions and begin further negotiations over nuclear issues.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Ivory Coast beats Ecuador 1-0 in World Cup game
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: US, Iran reach deal to end war
item.description: The United States and Iran agreed a peace deal and an "immediate and permanent" end to military operations on all fronts including Lebanon, mediator Pakistan said, signaling the apparent end to more than three months of war in Middle East. Pakistani Prime Minister Shebhaz Sharif posted on X that a peace deal "has been REACHED" and an official signing ceremony will be held on June 19 in Switzerland. "The Deal with the Islamic Republic of Iran is now complete," US President Donald Trump swiftly confirmed with his own statement on Sunday, as he marked his 80th birthday. The accord is set to be signed in Switzerland on the 19th of June. It follows weeks of discussions and back and forth attacks from both nations, with Iran threatening as late as Sunday to retaliate for Israel's deadly strikes on Lebanon.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: World Cup 2026: Netherlands let victory slip as Japan salvage point with last-gasp header
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: World Cup 2026: Japan deny Netherlands with last-gasp equaliser
item.description: Netherlands and Japan ended their Group of Death encounter in a dramatic 2-2 draw after a thrilling spectacle in the second half. Daichi Kamada's stunning last-gasp header salvaged a point for the Samurai Blue, denying Oranje what appeared to be a crucial victory in a group where every point is precious.
item.source: © Charlotte Wilson, Getty Images via AFP
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Pakistan's prime minister says US and Iran have reached ceasefire deal
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Iran’s World Cup team arrive in United States
item.description: Iran’s World Cup team touched down on American soil on Sunday, arriving at Los Angeles International Airport after a short flight from their base camp in Mexico. This is the first time in the cup’s nearly 100-year history that a host nation receives a country it is at war with.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Netherlands - Japan: Dramatic late equaliser for Samurai Blue
item.description: The Netherlands and Japan played out a thrilling 2-2 draw in a decisive Group of Death encounter that leaves both teams' knockout ambitions hanging in the balance. Japan came from behind twice but ultimately had to settle for a late equaliser through Daichi Kamada's stoppage-time header, denying Oranje a decisive victory. Read our liveblog to see how the match unfolded.
item.dc:creator: Mehdi BOUZOUINA

item.title: World Cup 2026: Germany overpower tournament debutant Curaçao
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: World Cup 2026: Germany overpower tournament debutant Curaçao
item.description: Germany made a successful start to World Cup 2026 on Sunday, demolishing Curaçao 7-1 in Boston. The four-time world champions were clinical in their execution, with goals from Felix Nmecha, Nico Schlotterbeck, Kai Havertz, Jamal Musiala, Nathaniel Brown, and Deniz Undav. Despite the heavy defeat, Curaçao marked their historic World Cup debut with a goal of their own through Livano Comenencia.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Trump at 80: "Harry Houdini" & A Cage Fight
item.description:
President Trump turns 80 today, and the White House lawn has been transformed into a giant arena, complete with floodlights, cameras, giant Star-Spangled Banners and a 90-foot scaffold known as “The Claw,” as 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue hosts “Freedom 250”, a celebration featuring professional UFC cage fighting.
The event combines three occasions: President Trump’s birthday, Flag Day, which marks the adoption of the U.S. flag in 1777, and the launch of celebrations leading up to the 250th anniversary of American independence.
Professor Jeffrey Sonnenfeld has known President Trump for 25 years and has critiqued his leadership style in the best selling book Trump’s Ten Commandments. He is also Senior Associate Dean for Leadership Studies at the Yale School of Management and has advised five U.S. presidents. He's been speaking to France 24's Gavin Lee.
item.dc:creator: Gavin LEE

item.title: Putin and Zelensky hold separate calls with Trump on his birthday
item.description: Russia’s Vladimir Putin and Ukraine’s Volodomyr Zelensky on Sunday held separate calls with US President Donald Trump as the latter prepared to celebrate his 80th birthday. The leaders discussed the war in Ukraine and their perceptions on how the more then four-year conflict could be ended.
item.source: © Aurelien Morissard, Pavel Bednyakov, AP/ File picture
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: Tech 24 takes to the skies as VivaTech takes over the Champs-Elysées
item.description: France’s biggest geek get-together started with a bang this year. For its 10th anniversary, the VivaTech trade show took to the Champs-Elysées, billing the installation as "Europe's largest open-air technology experience."
item.dc:creator: Peter O'BRIEN

item.title: Swiss police fire tear gas as anti-G7 protesters target UN buildings
item.description: Swiss police on Sunday fired tear gas at demonstrators protesting the upcoming Group of Seven summit in France after some protesters started targeting buildings linked to the United Nations in Geneva.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: American musician Oliver Tree killed in helicopter crash in Brazil
item.description: Oliver Tree, a US alt-pop singer and internet personality, died in a helicopter crash in Brazil on Sunday, a police source said. He was 32. Tree was on a world tour when the helicopter he was travelling in collided with another mid-air. A total of six people died in the incident, which left no survivors.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE 24

item.title: UK intercepts Russian shadow fleet vessel in Channel: ministry
item.description: British forces on Sunday intercepted a sanctioned oil tanker belonging to Russia's shadow fleet in the English Channel, the defence ministry said, in a six-hour operation hailed by Kyiv.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24

item.title: Trump vows Mideast deal is on, calls for no more attacks
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday said Israeli strikes on Beirut "should not have happened" as he vowed a regional peace deal was at hand, though he did not confirm his earlier claim it would be signed during the day. France 24's Noga Tarnopolsky tells us more.
item.dc:creator: FRANCE24
